column2: Verify System Prevents Changes on Locked Gates
column3: ['Log in as the CAA Program Manager. ', 'Attempt making changes at a locked gate. ', 'Verify error message displayed for locked gates. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in with valid credentials. ', 'The system should not allow changes to be made, and no change is observed. ', 'An error message indicating the gate has been locked is shown. ']
